description: Industry-specific valuation multiples for alternative models (DDM, FFO, Revenue Multiple) and exit-multiple terminal value cross-check. Values represent sector median multiples derived from market data. v1.3.1 (RM-2 P1 second pass) realigns TECH_AI EV/Revenue 10.0 -> 12.0 and HEALTH_BIOTECH EV/Revenue 6.0 -> 5.0 to the values pinned in docs/reviewer/RM-2-sector-multiple-coverage-gaps.md Phase 1; the seven RM-2 P1 buckets now match the tracker contract exactly. v1.3.0 (T2-P4-W1) renames REIT subsector keys from bare form (RESIDENTIAL, DATA_CENTER, ...) to REIT_* prefixed form (REIT_RESIDENTIAL, REIT_DATACENTER, ...) to align with the parallel Tier 2 archetype rules in assumption_profiles.json that key on REIT_* prefixes. v1.2.0 (VAL-3 P1+P4) recalibrated REIT subsector P/FFO multiples and cap rates to 2025-26 ranges and added CELLTOWER + SPECIALTY buckets. The FFO model's longest-prefix-match lookup operates over these prefixed keys.
